task_description: Build a personal task manager MVP with Next.js App Router, Supabase Auth (email/password), and Supabase Postgres for task persistence. Features: signup/login, CRUD tasks, toggle complete, RLS data isolation. All UI uses responsive Tailwind CSS and semantic HTML.

verification.summary: npm run build passes (all pages compile, routes /login, /signup, / are generated). npm run lint passes with zero errors. No test framework configured in this project (no unit tests to run). No Dockerfile present.
